title: Pack O' Allay
description: Adds more allay variations (and generally more allay-related items) using CIT and CEM features
body:
**Optifine (or a [substitute of it](https://github.com/LambdAurora/optifine_alternatives)) is required for this pack to properly function**

ever felt like the normal allay having no variety is boring? then you've come to the right place. this pack aims to provide more variants to the allay using the power of name tags and  CEM! there's also a couple of misc CIT items that you can feed your allay obsession with.

for the list of all names, [click here!](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1DxCw-DIAIHxcw6K27rYuXGHofLgjtAaOm7cKEMY0OvY)

don't forget to join my [discord server](https://discord.gg/5b3vf4XaXn) if you like my work!
